scripts.build: npm run clear && npm run build:cjs && npm run build:esm && npm run build:types
scripts.test: npm run test:node && npm run test:deno && npm run test:gjs && npm run test:browser
scripts.test:browser: npm run test:browser:esm && npm run test:browser:cjs
